LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER NATIONAL BROOM COMPANY OF CALIFORNIA, INC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED IN PART. RESPONDENT SHALL PREPARE AN ORDER GRANTING THE MOTION AND CONFIRMING THE AWARD AND PREPARE A JUDGMENT WHICH STATES: "PETITIONER NATIONAL BROOM COMPANY OF CALIFORNIA, INC., SHALL PAY FORTHWITH TO RESPONDENT ATTORNEY ROBERT FRANK CAMPBELL THE SUM OF $152,698.00 PLUS INTEREST IN THE AMOUNT OF TEN PERCENT PER ANNUM FROM SEPTEMBER 4, 2015." ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: John Claassen of Claassen Professional Corporation telephone number 510-251-8010 for Petitioner.
Respondent Robert Campbell telephone number 510-835-1948 in Propria Persona.

The matter was argued. Mr. Campbell's request for a statement of decision was denied. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER NATIONAL BROOM COMPANY OF CALIFORNIA, INC's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted in part. Respondent shall prepare an order granting the motion and confirming the award and prepare a judgment which states: "Petitioner National Broom Company of California, Inc., shall pay forthwith to Respondent Attorney Robert Frank Campbell the sum of $152,698.00 plus interest in the amount of ten percent per annum from September 4, 2015." Order and judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

Notice Of Motion & Motion For Leave To Deposit Sums With The Clerk Of The Court
Off Calendar Dec-29-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Claassen of Claassen Professional Corporation telephone number 510-251-8010 for Petitioner National Broom Company.
Robert Campbell telephone number 510-835-1948 Respondent in Propria Persona.

The Court denied Mr. Claassen's request for a statement of decision. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER NATIONAL BROOM COMPANY OF CALIFORNIA, INC.'S Motion For Leave To Deposit Sums With The Clerk Of The Court is denied without prejudice. The court cannot rule on the motion for leave to deposit without first ruling on a motion to confirm the arbitration award. Petitioner is advised to schedule a noticed hearing and motion for the petition to confirm the arbitration award. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

Notice Of Application For Writ And Posession And Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-29-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Claassen of Claassen Professional Corporation telephone number 510-251-8010 for Petitioner National Broom Company.
Robert Campbell telephone number 510-835-1948 Respondent in Propria Persona.

The Court denied Mr. Claassen's request for a statement of decision. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER NATIONAL BROOM COMPANY OF CALIFORNIA, INC'S Application For Writ And Posession is denied without prejudice. The court cannot rule on the application for writ and possession without first ruling on a motion to confirm the arbitration award. Petitioner is advised to schedule a noticed hearing and motion for the petition to confirm the arbitration award. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

Notice Of Motion & Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Dec-29-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Claassen of Claassen Professional Corporation telephone number 510-251-8010 for Petitioner National Broom Company.
Robert Campbell telephone number 510-835-1948 Respondent in Propria Persona.

The Court denied Mr. Claassen's request for a statement of decision. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER NATIONAL BROOM COMPANY OF CALIFORNIA, INC'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction is denied without prejudice. The court cannot rule on the motion for preliminary injunction without first ruling on a motion to confirm the arbitration award. Petitioner is advised to schedule a noticed hearing and motion for the petition to confirm the arbitration award. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)
